zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stacey於1431年出生在英國英格蘭肯特比登登時，他的父親William Stacy30歲，母親Lady Margaret Wydeville6歲。他於大約1456年與Alice Pashley在英國英格蘭肯特比登登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1468年11月20日在英國肯特享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stacey于1431年出生在英国英格兰肯特比登登时，他的父亲William Stacy30岁，母亲Lady Margaret Wydeville6岁。他于大约1456年与Alice Pashley在英国英格兰肯特比登登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1468年11月20日在英国肯特享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stacey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stacy
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Stacy, a diminutive of Stace , a pet form of Eustace .
In some cases an American shortened and altered form of Greek Stasinopoulos, a patronymic from the personal name Stasinos .

variants.name: Stas
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: from a shortened form of the personal name Eustaes, from Latin Eustacius (see Stacey ).
Polish (Staś); Slovak and Czech (Staš): from Staś, Staš, a pet form of the personal name Stanisław (Polish), Stanislav (Slovak and Czech).

variants.name: Stassen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fabienne, Eloi.
Dutch, Flemish, and German: patronymic from Stas, a shortened form of the personal name Anastasius or Eustacius (see Stacey ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stacey was born in 1431, in Biddenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Stacy, was 30 and his mother, Lady Margaret Wydeville, was 6. He married Alice Pashley about 1456, in Biddenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 November 1468, in Kent, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stacey est né en 1431, à Biddenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Stacy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Wydeville, avait 6 ans. Il a épousé Alice Pashley environ 1456, à Biddenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1468, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stacey è nato il nel 1431 nel Biddenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Stacy, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Wydeville, aveva 6 anni. Lui sposato Alice Pashley circa 1456, nel Biddenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 novembre 1468, nel Kent, England, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Staceyが1431年にイギリスイギリスケントビッドエンデンで生まれた時，父William Stacyは30歳，母Lady Margaret Wydevilleは6歳であった。約1456年にイギリスイギリスケントビッドエンデンでAlice Pashleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1468年11月20日にイギリスケントで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stacey(이)가 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비데든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stacy(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Wydeville(은)는 6세였다. 그는 대략 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비데든에서 Alice Pashley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 11월 20일 영국 켄트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stacey nasceu em 1431, em Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Stacy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Wydeville, tinha 6 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Pashley aproximadamente 1456, em Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1468, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stacey родился в 1431 г. в местности бидденден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Stacy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Wydeville, 6. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Pashley около 1456 г. в местности бидденден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 ноября 1468 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.
